title: More Invisibility
description: Makes mobs with the Invisibility effect skip rendering.
body:
![invisible husk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c911607c427f41e1086a72698945e32c0bebd4b6.gif)

This mod skips rendering of entities invisible to the player, hiding held items and worn armor.

This is a client-side–only mod and does not require server installation.

It also does not render the heads of players in Spectator mode.
